name: Brakeman — Ruby on Rails SAST
description: Imports a Brakeman (presidentbeef) static-analysis report: each warning (SQLi, XSS, mass-assignment, command injection, unsafe redirect, …) becomes a finding on the scanned application (ASSET), with severity from Brakeman's confidence. From the awesome-web-hacking toolkit. Pass `file` = a Brakeman JSON report (`brakeman -f json`), or run with no config for the bundled sample.
